name: phidown
description: Search and download Copernicus Data Space and PhiSat-2 data with the phidown CLI and Python API.

interface.shortDescription: Search and download Copernicus and PhiSat-2 data
interface.longDescription: Use phidown to search Copernicus Data Space and PhiSat-2 products, run Sentinel-1 burst coverage analysis, and drive reproducible downloads through the local CLI or Python API.
defaultPrompt: Search Copernicus products and download them with phidown
Find Sentinel-1 burst coverage for an AOI and date range
Download a PhiSat-2 product by name or search token
